title: Priority Column on "My Work"
excerpt: Would love for the priority column to be added to the my work screen. My team tends to have quite a bit assigned to them in a given day and having the ability to prioritize or even simply re-arrange the tasks would be a …

posts.author: AshlyKeating (Ashly Keating )
posts.cookedHtml: Would love for the priority column to be added to the my work screen. My team tends to have quite a bit assigned to them in a given day and having the ability to prioritize or even simply re-arrange the tasks would be a game changer.

posts.author: remawhirter (Rachel Mawhirter)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes!! I just logged in to submit this same idea. It seems to be a little pointless to have it if I can’t see it in MyWork to help prioritize my time for the week. Our team would love this feature!
